name: Feria de Abril
traditions: Flamenco dancing in private casetas (tents); horse parades; women in traje de flamenca dresses; sherry and tapas; bullfighting.
historicalBackground: The Feria de Abril began in 1847 as a livestock fair. It quickly evolved into Seville's greatest secular celebration of Andalusian culture.
description: Seville's vibrant spring fair, a week of flamenco, fine horses, and Andalusian elegance in a city of colorful lantern-lit casetas.
